---
id: create-profile
title: "Create a Profile"

sidebar_label: "Create a Profile"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a Profile"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/profiles"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Register a new Profile in `DRAFT` status. The Profile will not schedule
any windows until explicitly enabled via `POST /api/profiles/{id}/enable`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}

>
